creator: dirk@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You are the third person offering this patch 8-) 

It doesn't work at all. I tried to do it the "right way" and 
it is nearly a nightmare. I think creating an expat port  
an let apache13-php3 depend on this port would be much cleaner. 

Did you install expat locally in /usr/local/?
